The tree's fruits, seeds, and bark have been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to their numerous health benefits, including treating fever, diarrhea, and wounds. The bioactive constituents of the Baobab tree include vitamins A and C, potassium, magnesium, and fiber, as well as various alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids.
